overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rainy neon-lit Night City street at night. The journey begins under the Valentino's sign, passes through a covered underpass, and continues across a wide intersection toward the Jacked and Cork building, with heavy rain creating reflective wet surfaces throughout.

events.description: large purple umbrella passes directly in front of camera, temporarily blocking view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk beneath the Valentino's sign, observing pedestrians and neon reflections on wet pavement

notable_agents.action: man in dark suit walking toward camera with briefcase
woman holding yellow umbrella walking in opposite direction

entered.detail: large red neon sign reading 'VALENTINO'S' mounted on the building facade
tall glass and steel skyscraper with illuminated windows rising into the fog
rain-slicked concrete pavement reflecting neon lights and street lamps
tall modern street lamp casting bright white light through the rain

segments.scene_description: Walking along a rain-soaked sidewalk beneath the glowing red Valentino's neon sign. The narrow corridor between the building facade and street creates an intimate urban canyon, with pedestrians carrying umbrellas passing by in the opposite direction. Wet concrete reflects the neon lights and street lamps.

events.description: exiting the dark underpass into the open intersection area with brighter neon lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit concrete underpass, following a woman with a ponytail ahead

notable_agents.action: woman with blonde ponytail and black outfit walking ahead into the underpass

entered.detail: dark concrete ceiling of the highway overpass creating a tunnel-like effect
thick concrete pillars supporting the overpass structure

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a dark, enclosed concrete underpass beneath a highway. The heavy overhead structure blocks all sky visibility, creating a tunnel-like atmosphere with dim artificial lighting. Sparse pedestrians walk ahead in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sidewalk approaching major intersection with digital advertising

events.description: stepping off the sidewalk onto the wide yellow-striped pedestrian crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the open sidewalk toward the large intersection, passing groups of pedestrians with umbrellas

notable_agents.action: group of three pedestrians with umbrellas walking ahead toward the crosswalk

entered.detail: large orange neon sign reading 'JACKED AND CORK' mounted on distant building facade
multiple large digital advertising screens displaying various advertisements on building walls
red neon sign reading 'SOFT' with geometric frame mounted on building

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the underpass into a more open urban area with expansive views of towering glass buildings covered in digital billboards. The prominent orange 'JACKED AND CORK' neon sign dominates the view ahead as the camera approaches a wide intersection. Rain continues to fall, creating reflective pools on the concrete.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide pedestrian crosswalk with yellow hazard stripes

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection following the yellow striped crosswalk, moving toward the Jacked and Cork building

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving through the intersection, headlights illuminating the rain
pedestrian with child crossing from left side

entered.detail: broad pedestrian crossing with bold yellow and black diagonal hazard stripes

segments.scene_description: The camera moves across the expansive intersection following the prominent yellow-striped crosswalk. The open space reveals the full scale of the surrounding cyberpunk cityscape with towering buildings, neon advertisements, and moderate vehicle traffic moving through the rain-slicked streets.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-drenched urban corridor that transitions from a narrow neon alleyway into a vast, open cityscape. It begins on a rain-soaked sidewalk beneath the glowing red Valentino's sign, moving through an intimate urban canyon where wet concrete reflects the surrounding lights. The scene then shifts into the oppressive darkness of an enclosed concrete underpass, creating a tunnel-like atmosphere that blocks out the sky. As the camera emerges from the underpass, the environment opens up to reveal towering glass buildings and the dominant orange glow of the Jacked and Cork sign. Finally, the movement carries across a wide, yellow-striped intersection, expanding the view to encompass the full scale of the cyberpunk skyline and its rain-slicked streets.
